title: Rivera, Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park
topic_path: Rivera, Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park

assessment_items.question_content:
***Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* represents a single event from Mexican history.**

![Diego Rivera, Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park (Sueño de una tarde dominical en la Alameda Central), 1947, 4.8 x 15 m (Museo Mural Diego Rivera, originally, Hotel del Prado, Mexico City)](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e957c26b26966736294762721d776308.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
***Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* represents hundreds of individuals from Mexican history strolling through Mexico City's largest park.**

**[Read this essay to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1907-1960-age-of-global-conflict/latin-american-modernism/a/rivera-dream-of-a-sunday-afternoon-in-alameda-central-park)**

assessment_items.question_content: ***Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* belongs to the [[☃ dropdown 1]] art movement because it is a representation of [[☃ dropdown 2]].**
hints:
***Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* belongs to the Surrealist art movement.**

**[Read this essay to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1907-1960-age-of-global-conflict/latin-american-modernism/a/rivera-dream-of-a-sunday-afternoon-in-alameda-central-park)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Rivera's *Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* emphasizes a view of Mexican history . . .**



![Diego Rivera, Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park (Sueño de una tarde dominical en la Alameda Central), 1947, 4.8 x 15 m (Museo Mural Diego Rivera, originally, Hotel del Prado, Mexico City)](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e957c26b26966736294762721d776308.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Rivera's *Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* emphasizes a view of Mexican history that includes indigenous people and the masses.**

**[Read this essay to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1907-1960-age-of-global-conflict/latin-american-modernism/a/rivera-dream-of-a-sunday-afternoon-in-alameda-central-park)**

choices.content: that emphasizes the role of religious institutions.
that includes indigenous people and the masses.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Please match the detail of *Dream of a Sunday Afternoon in Alameda Central Park* with the appropriate description.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
**The detail with the skeleton show Surrealist artists. The detail with the Mexican flag and rearing horse represents the fight for independance. The detail with the balloons represents conquest and colonization, with the figures in period costumes on the far left.**

**[Read this essay to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1907-1960-age-of-global-conflict/latin-american-modernism/a/rivera-dream-of-a-sunday-afternoon-in-alameda-central-park)**
